title: Blueberry Flavour
description: A simple yet unique texture pack that redesigns the UI to taste like blueberries
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bf047a16c72ccdc7b105daf33b6260648bb003d.png)
**Blueberry Flavour is a simple Minecraft resource pack that completely overhauls the game's GUI by making it... well, more blueberry themed. This pack transforms the look and feel of your menus and in-game elements into a bold combination of dark tones and vivid blue accents.**

- # Features
> The entire user interface has been reimagined with a clean dark theme complemented by sharp blue highlights.
> The hunger bar now showcases shiny blueberries.

- # Version
> This pack is designed for Minecraft 1.21, but should work on later versions with minimal adjustments.
> I do not plan on making the texture pack for older versions since im too lazy

- # Other flavours
> Yet to release
